turns.source_text: I always move back and always regret it.
turns.user_message: I keep making the same mistakes and regretting them after. You'd think I'd learn by now.
I had a chance to do something right for once and I blew it again. I'm so tired of letting myself down.
I can't think of a single important thing I haven't eventually messed up. At some point it stops being bad luck and starts being who I am.
